Revision date Tab Description
45992 All files Added new variables SRC_LCTN_CD, TOT_BENE_COINSRNC_LBLTY_AMT, TOT_BENE_COPAY_LBLTY_AMT, TOT_BENE_DDCTBL_LBLTY_AMT, and CMBND_BENE_CST_SHRNG_PD_AMT to all header claims. 
Also added new fields ORDRG_PRVDR_ID and ORDRG_PRVDR_NPI to OT header file.
Added new field RX_ORGN_CD to RX header file.
Added new variable IHS_SRVC_IND to all line files.
Added five new variables to RX line file: DSPNSNG_FEE_PD_AMT, INGRDNT_CST_BILLED_AMT, INGRDNT_CST_PD_AMT,
